# React and Redux Learning Portal

This is a hands-on learning website for React and Redux featuring interactive examples and comprehensive learning content.

## Project Overview
- React 18 with Vite for fast development
- Redux Toolkit for state management
- Multiple learning sections with notes
- Interactive Redux examples (Counter, Todo List, User Management)
- Modern, responsive UI design

## Development
- Use modern React patterns (hooks, functional components)
- Follow Redux Toolkit best practices
- Keep components modular and reusable
- Maintain clean code structure
